_comment: Each test case needs a PDF uploaded under 'fixture_pdf' before running evals. 'expected_sources' lists (filename, page) pairs that MUST appear in retrieved sources. 'keywords' are words that should appear in the answer.

test_cases.question: What is the main purpose of this document?

test_cases.description: Citation enforcement — answer must cite a source
test_cases.question: Summarise the key findings.

test_cases.description: Out-of-scope question — must refuse, not hallucinate
test_cases.question: What is the weather in London today?
